{{Quote|I have no doubt that many of my colleagues here have no idea where the Lahara sector is. They couldn't even find it on a map if their careers depended on it, but we've been burdened with high taxes and little to show for it for too long. Perhaps now you'll notice us, if only for our absence.|Tyreca Bremack|<ref name="HNN 50">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|news/1344_4.html|Lahara Sector Secedes}}</ref>}}
'''Tyreca Bremack''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented the 245 systems of the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]], which seceded from the Republic and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
